# Hummico Designs

Sister-owned studio hand-packing organic herbal tea gift boxes and wellness gift sets in Houston, Texas. Shop on Etsy.

## About

Hummico Designs is a sister-owned business based in Houston, Texas. We curate and hand-pack organic herbal tea gift boxes and wellness gift sets, made for calming rituals and thoughtful gifting. Our copy is intentionally claim-free — we describe ingredients and the gifting experience, not health outcomes.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hummicodesigns.com/) — Organic herbal tea gift boxes and wellness sets, hand-packed in Houston, TX.
- [About](https://hummicodesigns.com/about/) — The story of the two sisters behind Hummico Designs and the values behind every box.
- [Collections](https://hummicodesigns.com/collections/) — Tea ritual boxes, wellness gifts, coffee retreat sets and self-care bundles, available on Etsy.
- [Blog — The Hummico Journal](https://hummicodesigns.com/blog/) — Tea-brewing guides, calming herbal blends and gift-box inspiration.
- [Contact](https://hummicodesigns.com/contact/) — Reach out about questions, custom orders or wholesale; sister-owned and based in Houston, TX.

## Blog posts

- [How to Brew Loose-Leaf Herbal Tea](https://hummicodesigns.com/blog/how-to-brew-loose-leaf-herbal-tea/) — A simple step-by-step guide to water temperatures, steeping times and getting the most flavour from loose-leaf herbal tea.
- [Calming Herbal Teas & What People Love Them For](https://hummicodesigns.com/blog/calming-herbal-teas/) — A claim-free look at chamomile, lavender, rose, peppermint and more, and the Hummico blends they belong to.
- [What's Inside a Hummico Tea Gift Box](https://hummicodesigns.com/blog/whats-inside-a-hummico-tea-gift-box/) — A guide to the hand-blended teas, honey sticks and gentle self-care touches curated into every box.
